Annual plans offer approximately 25% discount compared to monthly billing (e.g., $99/mo = $1,188/yr vs $74/mo billed annually = $888/yr). Additional credits available at $0.50-$0.60 per credit depending on plan tier. Free trial provides 5 credits for 7 days. Black Friday promotion offers 40% off annual plans.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 15 B2B email credits/month, 5 phone credits/month, 5 direct email credits/month, 100 export limit, limited enrichment automations (3 launches/month, 25 leads per launch), no API access, no integrations beyond basic

tiers.name: Starter
key_features: Enrichment automations (3 launches/month, 500 leads per launch)

tiers.name: Business
key_features: Enrichment automations (10 launches/month, 1,000 leads per launch)

notes: Kaspr uses a hybrid pricing model combining per-user seat pricing with usage-based credits (B2B email, phone, direct email, and export credits). Annual billing offers 25% discount. Free plan is generous with unlimited B2B emails. Add-on credits available for Phone, Direct Email, and Export credits with volume-based pricing. Organization plan requires minimum 5 users and annual subscription only. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales for custom pricing with unlimited credits and advanced features including intent data and advanced Salesforce enrichment.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 50 credits per month, basic Discover filters, AI Assistant in Discover, 1 email account, 500 recipients per sequence, regular support

notes: Usage-based pricing model with credits system. Credits are consumed for email finding (Domain Search, Email Finder) and verification (Email Verifier). 30% discount applied when paying annually. Unlimited team members on all plans. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales for custom credit amounts and pricing. Additional email accounts and custom domains available as add-ons. Non-profit organizations receive 30% discount on monthly plans.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 5 legally-binding eSignatures per month, 5 documents sent per month, limited templates (up to 5), limited rooms (up to 3), no custom branding, no approval workflows, no automations

tiers.name: Launch
key_features: 60 documents per year, then $3 per additional doc
Rich media drag and drop document editor

tiers.name: Starter
key_features: Rich media drag and drop document editor

notes: PandaDoc offers flexible pricing with both per-seat and per-document options. Launch tier is a flat $9/month with unlimited seats but includes only 60 documents per year. Annual billing saves up to 46% compared to monthly billing. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales. The page mentions CPQ (Configure Price Quote), Smart Content, and Workflow Automation but does not explicitly describe these as AI-powered features.

tiers.name: Quote-to-Revenue
key_features: Complete automated solution from Sales to Finance

notes: DealHub does not publish specific pricing on their pricing page. All plans require contacting sales for a custom quote. The company mentions 'DealHub AI' as a top feature and 'AI Contract Search & Insights' as a coming soon feature in the CLM tier. Digital DealRoom and DealSign appear to be add-on features.

Pricing shown is per user per month. Annual pricing offers significant discount (approximately 34% off monthly rates). Basic tier annual is $19/user/mo when billed annually. Team tier can be billed quarterly or annually. Business plan starts at $3,900/year with custom pricing available. All plans include monthly send limits with overage fees ($0.50-$0.75 per additional send). Free trial includes all Team plan features for 14 days. Annual billing offers 'up to 4 months free' on Basic tier.

Business plan includes 1 user; Enterprise plan includes minimum 10 users and requires annual billing. Annual discount of 10% available on Business plan. AI Proposal Creator is mentioned in navigation but not detailed in pricing tiers. QwilrPay transaction fees: Business 0.09%, Enterprise 0.05%. API add-on available with custom quote. Free trial includes full Business plan features with no credit card required.

GetAccept offers a per-seat pricing model with three tiers. eSign is the entry-level at $25/user/month. Professional is $49/user/month (minimum 5 users) and includes AI features with some usage limits. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales. AI features are prominently included in Professional and Enterprise tiers. Free trial is available but duration not specified on pricing page. Currency can be selected between USD, GBP, and EUR.

tiers.name: Personal
key_features: Securely store and access all agreements

tiers.name: Standard
key_features: Send 100 envelopes per user per year

tiers.name: Business Pro
key_features: Send 100 envelopes per user per year

ai_feature_names: Docusign Navigator powered by Docusign Artificial Intelligence

notes: Annual billing offers up to 44% savings compared to monthly. Personal plan is a flat rate; Standard and Business Pro are per-user pricing. Enhanced plans require contacting sales for custom pricing. Add-ons available: SMS delivery ($0.40/delivery) and ID verification ($2.50/attempt). IAM plans are separate from eSignature plans and include additional AI-powered features. Free trial duration not specified on page.

Conga does not display public pricing on this page. The page emphasizes custom pricing based on business needs, commitment to partnership, flexibility, and budget alignment. Users are directed to 'Get Conga pricing' which suggests a contact sales process.

Vendavo does not publish pricing on their website. All products appear to be enterprise solutions requiring contact with sales. The company emphasizes AI capabilities across multiple products including Vendavo AI, Sales Optimizer, and Deal Price Optimizer. Multiple calls-to-action for 'Request a Demo' and 'Contact Us' indicate custom pricing based on enterprise requirements.

ai_feature_names: CaptivateIQ Catalyst - Advanced modeling layer with predictive ML

notes: CaptivateIQ does not publish specific pricing on their pricing page. They use a per-seat pricing model based on the number of admin users plus payees, with a one-time setup fee. Pricing is customized based on number of payees, compensation plan complexity, and integrations required. The page explicitly states 'Contact us for a custom quote' and does not disclose any standard pricing tiers or rates. ASC-606 reporting is available as an add-on subscription.

tiers.name: Salesforce Spiff Additional Connectors
key_features: 1 way connection to external systems (excluding Salesforce)

tiers.name: Salesforce Spiff Premium Support
key_features: Support available via Phone, Email, Tickets, and Live Chat

notes: Pricing is per user per month, billed annually. No monthly billing option available. Page mentions AI in marketing language ('Automate commission and motivate sales on the #1 AI CRM') but no AI-specific features are listed in the pricing tiers. Premium Support is 30% of Net Price. Professional Services and additional connectors require contacting sales. No free trial currently available according to FAQ.

tiers.name: Growth
key_features: Deal Flagging, Overrides, and Discrepancy Resolution
Dedicated Customer Success Manager & Account Manager

tiers.name: Premium
key_features: Dedicated Customer Success Manager, Account Manager, and Data Engineer

notes: Pricing is per user per month plus a static platform fee. Growth tier has $525/month platform fee (includes first 5 users). Premium tier has $800/month platform fee (includes first 5 users). Both tiers are billed annually. The page mentions an 'Essential' package in the FAQ but does not provide pricing details for it on the main pricing section. Free trial available. AI Comp Plan Consult is mentioned as a separate offering in the navigation.
No public pricing information available on this page. The page focuses on demo booking and product comparison benefits. Pricing requires contacting sales.

ai_feature_names: Xactly Intelligence - Embedded AI with natural language exploration

notes: Xactly does not publish specific pricing on their website. All three tiers (Core, Plus, Ultimate) require contacting sales for a quote. Pricing is stated to depend on number of people being paid and plan complexity. No free trial is offered; they provide tailored demos instead. All tiers include various AI features, with AI Assistants in Core, and AI Agents & Proactive Insights in Ultimate. The platform offers modular add-ons including Xactly Extend, Xactly Intelligence, and Xactly Benchmarking, all available upon request.

Performio does not display public pricing on their website. The page mentions 'AI-Powered Incentive Comp' as a product feature but provides no pricing details. All pricing requires contacting sales or requesting a demo. The company is enterprise-focused and serves large global organizations.
